exemplar.title: To what degree has nikes foray in the metaverse contributed to its growth in sales revenue ?

detailedExemplarData.title: To what degree has nikes foray in the metaverse contributed to its growth in sales revenue ?

subject.title: Business Management
subject.description:
**IB Business Management** is a **Group 3** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **business fundamentals, human resource management, finance and accounts, marketing, and operations management**, with a strong focus on **case study analysis, real-world business applications, and strategic decision-making**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2024**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| **Assessment** | **Format** | **SL** | **HL** | **Weighting** |
|----------------|------------|--------|--------|---------------|
| **Paper 1** | Case study-based exam | 1h 30min | 1h 30min | SL: 35%, HL: 25% |
| **Paper 2** | Core themes exam | 1h 30min | 1h 30min | SL: 35%, HL: 30% |
| **Paper 3** | Social enterprise case study | N/A | 1h 15min | HL: 25% |
| **Internal Assessment** | Written commentary (SL) / Research project (HL) | Various | Various | SL: 30%, HL: 20% |

strengths: Consistent references to âchangeâ linked to Nikeâs metaverse initiatives
Clear analytical thinking when discussing firstâmover advantage and shifting consumer behaviour
weaknesses: Concept is mentioned repetitively and sometimes superficially
Lacks a concise definition of organizational change and deeper integration in every section
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The student demonstrates a good understanding of the key concept of change and regularly ties it to Nikeâs metaverse strategy (Band 3). While there are strong organizationâfocused analyses of initiatives like Nikeland and NFT revenues, the concept is not fully or consistently embedded throughout. A concise definition and deeper integration in each analytical paragraph are needed to reach a higher band.

strengths: Exactly five supporting documents cited, meeting quantitative requirements
All sources are relevant to Nike and the metaverse context
weaknesses: Sources are primarily journalistic and lack academic triangulation
Depth and critical evaluation of source reliability are limited
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The student supplies the required number of documents (5) and they are generally well chosen for relevance. However, the analysis of credibility and depth is only adequate (Band 3). Incorporating academic studies or primary data and critically assessing source reliability would raise this criterion to the top band.

strengths: Appropriate selection of three core strategic tools (STEEPLE, Ansoff, BCG)
Each tool is applied to Nikeâs metaverse activities with clear relevance
weaknesses: Justification for why these specific tools were chosen is missing
Applications are often descriptive rather than evaluative
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The student makes an adequate selection of business tools and theories and applies them to the research question, meeting Band 3 descriptors. To move into the highest band, the rationale for tool selection and deeper, evaluative discussion (e.g., defining BCG thresholds) should be provided.
feedback.groupName: Selection and Application of Tools and Theories

strengths: Uses concrete secondaryâmarket data (e.g., NFT revenues, visitor numbers) to support analysis
Includes qualitative insights (community building, collaborations) that enrich the evaluation
weaknesses: Analysis is uneven and at times remains descriptive
Risk and limitation evaluations are brief and not fully integrated
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The analysis goes beyond description in places (Band 3) and effectively uses some data, but it lacks consistency and depth for sustained, thorough evaluation. Greater integration of data with revenue impacts and a fuller appraisal of risks would elevate this to the next band.

strengths: Explicitly answers the research question regarding the impact on sales revenue
Conclusion aligns broadly with main findings
weaknesses: Quantitative backing and forwardâlooking recommendations are limited
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The conclusion directly addresses the research question (Band 3 descriptor for explicit answer) but only shows partial consistency with evidence due to limited quantitative support and shallow discussion of limitations (Band 2 overall). A more rigorous data summary and strategic recommendations would strengthen this section.

strengths: Clear overall organization with logical headings and numbered pages
Includes table of contents and coherent flow
weaknesses: Table of contents lacks accurate page references
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The structure is appropriate and facilitates reader navigation, fully meeting Band 2 descriptors. Addressing formatting glitches and ensuring consistent heading styles would polish this criterion.

strengths: All required presentation elements are present (title page, word count, candidate code, bibliography, figures)
Figures are labelled and IB requirements are met
weaknesses: Some diagrams (e.g., BCG matrix) lack axis labels and legends
Numeric placeholders are used without clear explanation
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Presentation fully satisfies IB requirements (Band 2). Minor improvementsâsuch as labelling all diagram axes and properly formatting equationsâwould refine the professionalism of the report.

strandSelections.reasoning: The report follows a logical sequence with clear headings, a table of contents and numbered pages, enabling coherent flow. Minor formatting glitches do not undermine overall appropriateness.

All sources are clearly relevant to Nike and the metaverse and provide usable data, but they are mainly journalistic articles with limited depth or triangulation; academic or primary data is absent, so relevance is good yet depth is only sufficient rather than wide-ranging.
The title page, word count, candidate code, bibliography and labelled figures are all present, meeting IB presentation requirements.
Exactly five supporting documents are cited, meeting the 3-5 requirement.

Each tool is applied to Nikeâs metaverse activities and linked to sales revenue, but much of the discussion remains descriptive (e.g., listing STEEPLE factors) with limited depth of evaluation. Relevance is generally clear, though not consistently incisive.

Some primary financial figures (NFT revenue, digital sales growth) and competitor comparisons are incorporated, showing adequate data selection and use. The dataset is narrow and heavily reliant on secondary press sources, preventing classification as âsufficientâ or âeffectiveâ.

Analysis moves beyond description in placesâlinking visitor numbers and NFT revenue to sales growthâbut is uneven. Evaluation of risks and limitations is brief and not fully integrated, so quality is âsome analysisâ rather than mostly effective.

The research question is explicitly answered in the concluding section, stating that Nikeâs metaverse expansion âextensively boosted sales revenueâ, satisfying the highest descriptor for directly addressing the RQ.

The student selects three core strategic tools (STEEPLE, Ansoff, BCG), an adequate range for this research question. More financial tools or ratio analysis would have raised the breadth and effectiveness.
The conclusion broadly aligns with the evidence presented, but quantitative backing is scant and limitations are acknowledged only superficially. Hence, consistency is partial rather than full.

Throughout the IA the student links Nikeâs specific initiatives (Nikeland visits, NFT revenues, RTFKT acquisition) to the discussion of change, providing a strong, organisation-focused analysis. While some points remain descriptive, most sections make explicit connections between Nikeâs strategic moves and their impact, reflecting partial integration across the assessment.

The student consistently refers to the key concept of change and links it to Nikeâs move into the metaverse, showing a good grasp of what organisational change entails. References to first-mover advantage, technological change and shifting consumer behaviour are woven through several sections, demonstrating clear analytical thinking. However, the concept is frequently mentioned in a repetitive, surface way (âchanging trendsâ) rather than being deeply embedded in every analytical paragraph, so the level of integration is solid but not yet âstrongâ or âfully integratedâ.

annotations.comment: The methodology section lists tools without justification for their selection. Explain why STEEPLE, Ansoff and BCG are most appropriate for assessing metaverse impact on revenue.
annotations.groupName: Selection and Application of Tools and Theories

annotations.comment: The supporting documents table indicates five sources but lacks evaluation of their reliability and depth. Critically assess each sourceâs credibility and triangulate with academic data.
The STEEPLE analysis describes factors but rarely ties them explicitly to sales revenue. For each factor, illustrate its direct or indirect impact on Nikeâs revenue growth.
The economic factor discussion ends midâsentence and lacks concrete figures. Complete the analysis by specifying NFT revenue figures and linking them to overall sales performance.
This numeric placeholder appears without context. Ensure all numeric and mathematical expressions are clearly explained and formatted, for example with $$â¦$$ for inline equations.
The research question formatting is fragmented across two lines, which may confuse the reader. Consolidate it into a single, clear sentence and ensure proper capitalization throughout.
The key concept 'Change' is identified but not defined in context. Provide a concise definition of organizational change and explain its relevance to Nikeâs metaverse initiative.
The table of contents omits page numbers and uniform formatting. Add accurate page references and ensure consistent heading styles to improve navigation.
The introduction succinctly describes Nikeâs background but relies heavily on description. Strengthen the analytical focus by previewing how metaverse initiatives link to sales growth.
The competitor comparison uses concrete secondaryâmarket data to contextualize Nikeâs strengthâthis effectively supports analysis of external positioning.
The market snapshot figure is not discussed in the text. Reference key trends from the chart (e.g., CAGR trajectories) and interpret their implications for Nikeâs revenue outlook.
The Ansoff matrix identifies 'market development' appropriately, yet the other quadrants remain unexplored. Briefly discuss why diversification or product development are less relevant.
annotations.groupName: Selection and Application of Tools and Theories

annotations.comment: The Ansoff discussion highlights market development but would be strengthened by appraising risks of this strategy in the metaverse context.
Citing the $17 million revenue boost is precise, yet it would be more rigorous to include the time frame and source directly with the figure.
The narrative on community building and collaboration with Murakami is engaging and illustrates qualitative benefits of metaverse engagement.
The BCG matrix diagram lacks axis labels and a legend. Clearly label market growth vs. market share axes to ensure the reader can interpret the positioning.
The classification of Crypto Kicks as a 'star' is justified with growth figures, but define thresholds (e.g., % share or CAGR) used for this category.
annotations.groupName: Selection and Application of Tools and Theories

annotations.comment: The conclusion restates findings but offers limited new insight or forwardâlooking recommendations. Propose strategic steps Nike could take to sustain metaverseâdriven growth.
The bibliography lists all five sources, meeting quantity requirements, but entries lack consistent formatting (e.g., italics, access dates). Adopt a standard citation style.
